positive: A stylized, minimalist graphic of a cosmic journey, featuring a lone, elegant crescent moon gently cradling a constellation map. Scattered around are stylized, abstract constellations rendered in metallic gold foil effect and deep indigo ink. Intertwined with the moon are elegant, flowing binary nebulae depicted as swirling smoke plumes in pastel lavender, turquoise, and seafoam green. The composition is circular and centered, designed to look excellent on apparel. Clean lines, high contrast silhouette against a deep midnight blue background. Pop art influence with vintage celestial cartography aesthetics. Perfect symmetry, highly detailed, vector illustration style.
